## Checklist

- [ ] All styles use CSS custom properties from `@gnome-ui/core`
- [ ] Dark mode works via `@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark)`
- [ ] Keyboard accessible
- [ ] Storybook story added or updated
- [ ] TypeScript types exported
- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` updated if applicable
